name: Puri Wildlife Division – Subject Matter Specialist – 4 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Puri Wildlife Division Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Subject Matter Specialist Posts
basic_details.short_information: Puri Wildlife Division Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Subject Matter Specialist - Seagrass. Candidates with M.Sc. / M.Tech Can Apply Offline. The offline application starts on 02-05-2026, and closes on 22-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Puri Wildlife Division official website puri.odisha.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. / M.Tech in Oceanography / Marine Science, M.Sc. in Botany / Life Science / Environmental Science / Coastal Ecology

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Puri Wildlife Division Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: Puri Wildlife Division SMS – Seagrass (Plant Specialist)
